title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.360 - "Sale" construed
text:
417.360.  "Sale" construed. — The requiring or taking of any deposit for any purpose upon such receptacle shall not be deemed nor held to be a "sale" either optionally or otherwise in any proceeding under sections 417.300 to 417.360.
(RSMo 1939 § 14094) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12455; 1919 § 12026
